auth.label: Application API Token
auth.description: Pushover application API token sent as the token parameter for application, message, group, and glance requests.

extraFields.label: Team API Token
extraFields.description: Optional Team API token used for Teams and licensing actions when the action input does not override token.

status.description: Pushover status code. Successful requests return 1.

request.description: Unique request identifier returned by Pushover.

errors.description: Error messages returned by Pushover when the request fails.

outputSchema.description: Common envelope returned by Pushover write operations.

actions.name: send_message
actions.description: Send a Pushover notification to a user or delivery group, with optional emergency settings, URL metadata, and image attachment.

user.description: Pushover user key or delivery group key.

url.description: Supplementary URL to show with the message.

url_title.description: Display title for the supplementary URL.

ttl.description: Seconds after which the message should expire.

retry.description: Retry interval in seconds for emergency priority messages.

expire.description: Retry expiration in seconds for emergency priority messages.

html.description: Whether message text contains HTML formatting.

monospace.description: Whether message text should use monospace formatting.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp to attach to the message.

callback.description: Callback URL for emergency notification receipts.

tags.description: Comma-separated tags for emergency retry cancellation.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type override to send to the provider.

attachment.description: Optional image attachment uploaded through POST /api/files.

attachment_type.description: MIME type for legacy inline base64 attachment input.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for sending a Pushover message.

status.description: Pushover status code. Successful requests return 1.

request.description: Unique request identifier returned by Pushover.

receipt.description: Receipt identifier returned for emergency notifications.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after sending a Pushover notification.
